cases.input: Our nightly Postgres-to-Firestore orders sync re-reads the whole table and duplicates docs on crash. Make it incremental on updated_at and crash-safe, keyed on order_id.
Import a 120k-row customers.csv into the Firestore customers collection one time, mapping legacy fields to the new shape.
Add write-time validation so a booking doc must have a future startTime, a positive seats count, and a known status enum across client, Cloud Function, and Firestore rules.
Design a data-quality framework for our payments collection: profile it, add validation rules with severity and owner, and monitor an anomaly threshold on daily transaction volume.
We need to add a required currency field to the existing 800k orders documents without breaking the old reader. Plan the schema change.
When a new order is written to Firestore, fan out to update inventory and send a confirmation via Cloud Functions without double-processing on retries.
Produce a recurring weekly CSV export of the analytics_events collection to a storage bucket for the finance team.
Design the end-to-end pipeline that ingests Stripe webhook events, stores them, validates them, and exposes a clean orders dataset with lineage.
Make sure bad data never gets into our users collection.
Overwrite all product prices in Firestore from a new pricing.json file tonight.
